Exhibition Room

Early Works

Paintings from the earlier years of practice, 2010–2012 — apple blossom, delphinium, and simple garden flowers studied in a quieter, more intimate palette.

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
